creator: o.kryvulia@flex-it.com.ua
text:
I have simple configuration:

ifconfig_vtnet0="inet 192.168.10.1/24"
vlans_vtnet0="2"
ifconfig_vtnet0_2="DHCP"

At system startup vtnet0.2 doesn't get IP, seems that dhclient is not started for this interface. But after boot I can run service dhclient start vtnet0.2 to get interface configured.

There is no problem with static IP configuration.
